name: entry-level FDM 3D printer
description: Entry-level FDM printer with 220 x 220 x 250 mm build volume and heated bed; open-source firmware.

name: Benchy
description: 60 mm long 3D-printed tugboat calibration model weighing about 15 g of PLA.

name: launch controller
description: Handheld 9 V-powered controller with removable safety key and 6 m (20 ft) leads for remote ignition of model rockets.

name: soldering iron kit
description: Pen-style 30 W iron with stand, cleaning sponge and 1 m of 0.8 mm lead-free solder for hobby electronics.

name: digital multimeter
description: Handheld multimeter with manual 20 V DC range, measures up to 600 V, 10 A and 2 MΩ. Includes test probes and replaceable fuse.

name: digital calipers
description: 150 mm stainless steel digital calipers with 0.01 mm resolution and auto-off.

name: claw hammer (16 oz)
description: 450 g (16 oz) drop-forged steel head, curved claw and 330 mm (13 in) fiberglass handle for nails.

name: wire stripper
description: Self-adjusting tool for stripping 24-10 AWG insulation cleanly.

name: utility cart
description: Two-shelf steel cart, 90×50×80 cm, weighs 15 kg and holds up to 120 kg of lab equipment.

name: wire cutters
description: Angled-cutting pliers for trimming component leads and wires cleanly.

name: tape measure
description: 3 m (10 ft) retractable steel tape measure with metric and imperial markings.

name: precision screwdriver set
description: Set of four mini Phillips and flathead screwdrivers for electronics repairs and robot assembly.

name: anti-static wrist strap
description: Adjustable wrist strap with grounding cord to prevent electrostatic discharge while handling components.

name: safety goggles
description: Clear polycarbonate goggles with side shields and elastic strap for eye protection.
